purpose: Freeze the LG five-company reference-slice questions after OpenDART identifier verification, annual financial extraction, source-backed claim promotion, and wiki seed compilation. This tests whether the common harness can route LG affiliates and produce bounded investor-facing financial answers across the selected first-slice companies.

paperUse.allowedClaim: LG demonstrates a fourth transfer slice using the same identifier verification, DART financial table, source-backed claim manifest, wiki namespace, and evaluation scenario schemas across five selected listed companies.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove full LG Group coverage, official IR narrative coverage, live news coverage, or commercial investment-advisory readiness.
paperUse.expansionNote: Future LG expansion should add exact document URLs, local official files, extraction reports, narrative claim queues, and promoted narrative claims without changing the common runtime schema.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Visible answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
Named-affiliate questions must route to that affiliate even though the visible UI stays group-level.
Narrative strategy, shareholder-return, battery, OLED, and appliance claims must not be inferred from unreviewed IR materials until source-backed narrative claims are promoted.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed financial claims. Additional selected claims are allowed only when they are affiliate-scoped and relevant.

scenarios.title: LG Electronics revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: LG전자 2024년 매출액과 영업이익을 2023년과 비교해서 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether LG Electronics questions route to LG Electronics and select OpenDART annual financial metric and trend claims.

scenarios.title: LG Chem revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: LG화학 2024년 실적을 매출액과 영업이익 기준으로 전년과 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether LG Chem questions route to LG Chem and preserve strict DART account labels.

scenarios.title: LG Energy Solution revenue and operating-income trend
scenarios.question: LG에너지솔루션 2024년 매출액과 영업이익 변화를 전년 대비로 설명해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether LG Energy Solution questions route to LG Energy Solution and avoid unpromoted battery narrative claims.

scenarios.title: LG Innotek revenue, operating income, and recent quarter
scenarios.question: LG이노텍 최근 실적과 2024년 매출액·영업이익 흐름을 함께 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether LG Innotek questions route to LG Innotek and combine OpenDART annual trend claims with the promoted issuer IR preliminary-result claim.

scenarios.title: LG Uplus revenue, operating income, and service revenue
scenarios.question: LG유플러스 최근 실적과 2024년 매출액·영업이익 흐름을 함께 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether LG Uplus questions route to LG Uplus and combine OpenDART annual trend claims with the promoted issuer IR service-revenue claim.

scenarios.title: LG Electronics and LG Chem financial comparison
scenarios.question: LG전자와 LG화학의 2024년 매출액과 영업이익 흐름을 비교해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether a cross-affiliate LG comparison preserves explicit company mentions, selects source-backed financial claims, and keeps the response within promoted evidence.
